notes: SHIP v1.14.340 - device fix pass (owner-verified .338/.339, 4 fixes). All #pg-cmd-scoped + a shared nav helper (rd_openOpsTool / nav_restore, redesign-gated) -> ?legacy byte-identical. FIX 1 (OPEN BAY label/arrow clipping): .cc-openbay had ZERO horizontal padding, so letter-spacing pushed the arrow to the edge; added padding:10px 18px + white-space:nowrap, and .cc-ob-ar letter-spacing:0 (kills the trailing space on the arrow). FIX 2 (OPEN BAY / hero tap had no way back to Home): cmd_openHeroBay opened the bay (deploy_showRackDetail when the rack is in the active deployment, else rd_openOpsTool('rackmap')) but the bay's Back returned to the Work grid, not Home. Now cmd_openHeroBay (a) reads rackId, (b) disposes the hero WebGL + nulls _rm3dDispose (no GL leak; showMode/cmd_render re-mounts on return), (c) nav_push({p:'command'}) as a Home waypoint, (d) for the deploy path showMode('work') then deploy_showRackDetail (its '<- Back' = nav_back -> {p:'command'}), for the rackmap path rd_openOpsTool('rackmap','nav_back()'). rd_openOpsTool gained an OPTIONAL backAction param (default preserves the Work-grid back for every other caller). NEW nav_restore branch: {p:'command'} && redesign -> showMode('command') (independent of _rdMode, which rd_openOpsTool flips to 'work'); showMode('command') clears ops-detail + re-runs cmd_render (hero re-mount). One obvious Back, both paths, Home + proper teardown. FIX 3 (ghost too small): .cc-asst-ghost 84->98px (+17%, owner 15-20%); markup width/height 74x84 -> 86x98 (portrait 0.880, art-law). .cc-asst-top is top-aligned so the card grows ~14px only - within the fold. FIX 4 (bottom content clipped behind the taller nav): the .339 .bicon 46->54 grew #rd-botnav to ~90px but :root --tabnav-h is 72 (stale) and can't change (legacy pages use it -> would break ?legacy); compensated in the #pg-cmd-scoped rules: phone padding-bottom calc(--tabnav-h + 20) -> +44, desktop grid padding-bottom +40 -> +44, so the last row (qtools / ops-signal / footer) scrolls fully clear + safe-area. Gates: inline-JS vm.Script x3 (cmd_openHeroBay + rd_openOpsTool + nav_restore touched), CSS brace net-0, sw.js ok, version.json valid, three-stamp .339->.340; phantom-ship-gate + phantom-rd-reviewer pre-commit. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD-REFRESH / clear SW first, PHONE): (1) 'OPEN BAY ->' renders whole, no clipping, at all widths; (2) tap the rack / OPEN BAY -> the bay opens, and its '<- Back' returns to HOME with the hero re-rendered (no black/stuck rack); (3) assistant ghost noticeably bigger, still breathing room, card not past the fold; (4) the last section on Home scrolls fully clear of the bottom nav (nothing hidden behind it). ?legacy=1 pixel-identical. NEXT = .341 desktop top-nav. ROLLBACK: revert this commit.
